mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver entry for the switch dispatch on name[0] and the xmlStrEqual comparisons, then substitutes 'a'/'amp'/'apos' into the input bytes, routing execution to case 'a' that blind havoc almost never hits.
one_line: I2S substitutes 'a' first-byte to enter entity switch case 'a'

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes name equality comparands from chain-walk CMPs back into input bytes, generating multiple hash entries colliding into one bucket so the linked list grows a non-NULL next pointer that the loop guard tests.
one_line: I2S generates colliding hash names to populate linked-list chain

mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts the switch CMP callback for the '-' byte and substitutes it at the NXT(2) offset, converting existing '<!E'/'<!A' seeds into '<!--' sequences that naive havoc cannot reliably land.
one_line: I2S substitutes single byte '-' at NXT(2) to enter switch case

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the single-byte `cur == 0` CMP via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp, reads operand 0 from the CmpLogObserver buffer, and substitutes 0x00 at the input offset feeding the cursor position that naive's blind havoc improbably reaches.
one_line: I2S substitutes 0x00 at cursor offset satisfying cur==0 in push-state

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver entries for the httpreq==HTTPREQ_GET/HEAD integer compares and method/header token strcmp/memcmps, substituting the matching constants into the input to manufacture a GET/HEAD request structure that naive's zero-dominated seeds never produce.
one_line: I2S manufactures GET/HEAD method and header bytes from CMP operands

mechanism_summary: I2S plants literal scheme, authority, and header field bytes from CMP operands so curl's parser reaches Curl_fopen; naive havoc cannot synthesize the full structured URL+headers prefix needed to drive the deep save-code path.
one_line: I2S assembles structured URL+headers enabling curl's deep save-path branch

mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts sqlite3GetToken character-class comparisons and substitutes the SELECT keyword chars and arithmetic-operator bytes into the seed, assembling the valid token stream that reaches the true branch at line 159609.
one_line: I2S assembles SELECT keyword and operator tokens to reach tokenizer true branch
